title: GoMining Challenges Jack Dorsey's Square With Bitcoin Payments System
summary: GoMining unveiled GoBTC Pay, a bitcoin payment protocol with an SDK and programmable access, enabling merchants to accept BTC for everyday purchases. This directly challenges Jack Dorsey's Square in the payments space.
body:
GoMining has unveiled GoBTC Pay, a new bitcoin payment protocol designed to enable merchants to accept bitcoin for everyday transactions. The system includes a software development kit (SDK) and programmable access, making it easier for businesses to integrate bitcoin payments into their operations.

The GoBTC Pay protocol is positioned as a direct competitor to Square's payment solutions, which have also been expanding into the bitcoin space. By providing a dedicated bitcoin payment system, GoMining aims to offer merchants a seamless way to accept BTC, potentially attracting more businesses to the cryptocurrency ecosystem.

This development is significant for everyday consumers and businesses as it provides an alternative to traditional payment systems. By using bitcoin, merchants can benefit from lower transaction fees and faster settlement times, while consumers can enjoy the advantages of a decentralized currency. This could lead to wider adoption of bitcoin in everyday transactions, making it more accessible and practical for everyday use.

For those interested in integrating bitcoin payments, GoMining's GoBTC Pay offers a straightforward solution. Merchants should watch for updates on the SDK and programmable access features, which will be crucial for seamless integration. Consumers can also look forward to more businesses accepting bitcoin as a payment method, making it easier to use crypto in daily life. Read more → https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/06/19/gomining-challenges-jack-dorsey-s-square-with-payments-system-designed-around-bitcoin
